title: libpod: include names-generator.go
body:
In the moby/moby, the namesgenerator is internal. We still want to depend on it, so this commit copies it from moby/moby to our code-base.

The good thing is the file is frozen upstream, so no more changes are going to appear in it.

Fixes: #27536.

comments.body: [NON-BLOCKING] Packit jobs failed. @containers/packit-build please check. Everyone else, feel free to ignore.
[NON-BLOCKING] Packit jobs failed. @containers/packit-build please check. Everyone else, feel free to ignore.
Can we get a comment on the top of the files indicating that changes will not he accepted that are not also in Moby? I don't want a ton of PRs to pop up adding names to the generator.

The docker repo file already included this note so the copied file here has the same in it

> This package is officially "frozen" - no new additions will be accepted.
